@startuml
participant Controller as "Controller"
participant <UDP or TCP>Service as "<UDP or TCP>Service"
participant Volt.<Udp or Tcp>Server as "Volt.<Udp or Tcp>Server"
participant AppSettings as "AppSettings"
participant MessageEncryptionChannel as "MessageEncryptionChannel"

participant Controller as "Controller"
participant <UDP or TCP>Service as "<UDP or TCP>Service"
participant Volt.<Udp or Tcp>Server as "Volt.<Udp or Tcp>Server"
participant AppSettings as "AppSettings"
participant MessageEncryptionChannel as "MessageEncryptionChannel"

note right of "Controller"
server()
end note

note right of "<UDP or TCP>Service"
getApplicationKey()
create(applicationKey)
channel(route, encryptionChannel)
Expect for routes and stream the service ...
end note

note right of "Volt.<Udp or Tcp>Server"
Volt.<Udp or Tcp>Server
end note

AppSettings
end note

MessageEncryptionChannel
